typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Skill guidance requires "context read evidence" but examples only use `test -f ...`, which proves file existence rather than read/inspection evidence and does not satisfy the intended auditable invariant.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace file-presence evidence examples (`test -f ...`) with read/inspection evidence commands (for example, `Read`/`Grep`/`Execute` patterns that capture actual file content access) in the worker SKILL.md templates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for misc-core-engine-worker-handoff-discipline-guidance found the weaker pattern in .factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md:109 and equivalent sections in switcher-core-worker, switcher-ui-worker, token-accounting-worker, and indexing-efficiency-worker.
